subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond thought and remembrance, beseemeth that Ever-Abiding Desired One, Who hath caused the horizon of proof to shine forth on the Day of Rising [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و فکر حضرت مقصود لایزالی را سزاست که افق برهانرا در یوم قیام
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @development of capacity and readiness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
